content.fact_text: Implementation of the CheckoutProcessorService class for atomic and fault-tolerant order checkout orchestration.

provenance_data.behaviour: The service provides a robust, circuit-breaker protected entry point for checkout, ensuring atomic state transitions via distributed locking and idempotent event publication.
interfaces: processCheckout(data: unknown): Promise<{ success: boolean; orderId: string }>
provenance_data.utility: Provides a highly-available, transactional, and observable service entry point for checkout processing.
